zh.lifeSummary: 當Alys verch Llewelyn於大約1302年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，她的父親Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel28歲，母親Alice Verch Llewelyn39歲。她與Hywel Ap Hywel結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1406年在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾享年105歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alys verch Llewelyn于大约1302年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，她的父亲Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel28岁，母亲Alice Verch Llewelyn39岁。她与Hywel Ap Hywel结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1406年在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾享年105岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Alys verch Llewelyn was born about 1302, in Breconshire, Wales, her father, Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel, was 28 and her mother, Alice Verch Llewelyn, was 39. She married Hywel Ap Hywel. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1406, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 105.

Elle a épousé Hywel Ap Hywel. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1406, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 105 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alys verch Llewelynが約1302年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywelは28歳，母Alice Verch Llewelynは39歳であった。Hywel Ap Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1406年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで105歳で死去した。

ko.Brecon St. John the Evangelist, Brecon,: 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘 스트 존 테 이반그리스트
ko.lifeSummary: Alys verch Llewelyn(이)가 대략 1302년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Verch Llewelyn(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Hywel Ap Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alys verch Llewelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Verch Llewelyn, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Hywel Ap Hywel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1406, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 105 anos.

ru.Brecon St. John the Evangelist, Brecon,: брекон ст джон т эвангелист, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alys verch Llewelyn родилась около 1302 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Verch Llewelyn, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hywel Ap Hywel. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1406 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 105 лет.

es.Brecon St. John the Evangelist, Brecon,: Brecon St John the Evangelist, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alys verch Llewelyn nació aproximadamente 1302, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Verch Llewelyn, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Hywel Ap Hywel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1406, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 105 años.
